metadata.name: Purchase Order (Auto Pay via Actions)
metadata.author: Agreements Protocol
metadata.description: Purchase order where payer signs first, then payee signs. Payment is executed as an on-chain action on the final signature transition.

payerEthAddress.name: Payer Address
payerEthAddress.description: Ethereum address of the paying party

payeeEthAddress.name: Payee Address
payeeEthAddress.description: Ethereum address of the receiving party

workTokenAddress.name: Payment Token (ERC-20) Address
workTokenAddress.description: ERC-20 token contract used for payment

paymentAmount.name: Payment Amount
paymentAmount.description: Amount of tokens to transfer upon final signature

tokenSymbol.name: Token Symbol
tokenSymbol.description: Symbol of the payment token (e.g., USDC, DAI)

payerName.name: Payer Name
payerName.description: Legal name of the paying party

payeeName.name: Payee Name
payeeName.description: Legal name of the receiving party

payeeSignature.name: Payee Signature
payeeSignature.description: Enter your name to create an electronic signature

effectiveDate.name: Effective Date
effectiveDate.description: The date when this purchase order becomes effective

scope.name: Scope of Cooperation
scope.description: The scope of cooperation between the parties

termDuration.name: Term Duration
termDuration.description: The duration of the purchase order

content.data:
# NON-BINDING REFERENCE AGREEMENT
## IMPORTANT: DEMO ONLY - NO LEGAL EFFECT

**THIS NON-BINDING REFERENCE AGREEMENT** is made effective upon the date of the final digital signature below, by and between:

**${variables.payerName}** ("Payer")

**${variables.payeeName}** ("Payee")

## 0. DEMONSTRATION ONLY / NO INTENT TO CREATE LEGAL RELATIONS

This reference agreement demonstrates protocol mechanics only.

The parties do not intend to create legal relations or any legally enforceable obligations by signing or executing this document.

No court, arbitration, or other tribunal proceeding may be brought to enforce any term of this reference agreement.

## 1. DEMO SCOPE

Any request, response, approval, or payment action exchanged between the parties is optional and included only to demonstrate application and protocol behavior.

Nothing in this reference agreement creates:
* any obligation to provide goods or services,
* any duty to negotiate future terms,
* any ongoing business, advisory, fiduciary, partnership, employment, or agency relationship.

## 2. TOKEN TRANSFER DEMONSTRATION

**2.1 Optional Demo Transfer**

The payer may choose to submit an optional token transfer solely to experience the protocol mechanics.

This transfer:
* is not consideration for goods or services,
* is not compensation,
* does not create any obligation for the payee to provide anything of value.

**2.2 Demo Amount**

An amount equal to:

**${variables.paymentAmount} ${variables.tokenSymbol}**

Token Contract:

**${variables.workTokenAddress}**

(the "Demo Amount").

**2.3 On-Chain Transfer Mechanics**

If the payer elects to proceed:

* (a) **Authorization.** The payer will approve the protocol smart contract to spend the Demo Amount from their wallet.
* (b) **Execution.** Upon the relevant cryptographic signature, the protocol may execute a transferFrom transaction moving the Demo Amount directly to the payee wallet defined at signing (**${variables.payeeEthAddress}**).
* (c) **No Escrow.** Funds are transferred immediately upon the relevant on-chain state transition and are not held in escrow.
* (d) **Irreversibility Acknowledgement.** Blockchain transfers may be irreversible and subject to network or smart contract risks.

## 3. DISCLAIMERS

**3.1 No Legal, Tax, Financial, or Investment Advice**

This template is provided as reference-app sample content only and does not provide legal, tax, financial, investment, or professional advice.

**3.2 As-Is Sample**

This template is provided "as is" with no warranties of any kind. Users should obtain appropriate professional advice before adapting any agreement for real-world use.

**3.3 No Governing Law**

Because this reference agreement is not intended to have legal effect, it has no governing law.

The parties acknowledge that any execution mechanics or state transitions associated with this reference agreement occur on the Ethereum Virtual Machine.

**IN WITNESS WHEREOF**, the parties have executed this reference agreement by their cryptographic signatures.

PENDING_TEMPLATE_VARIABLES.name: Pending Template Variables
PENDING_TEMPLATE_VARIABLES.description: Payer needs to fill out the template variables.

AGREEMENT_TERMINATED_WITHOUT_PAYMENT.name: Agreement Terminated Without Payment
AGREEMENT_TERMINATED_WITHOUT_PAYMENT.description: Payee chose not to participate, so the agreement is terminated without payment.

PAYMENT_COMPLETE.name: Payment Complete
PAYMENT_COMPLETE.description: Both parties have signed and payment has been executed.

payerSigning.description: Signature from payer accepting the purchase order terms.

payeeSigning.description: Signature from payee accepting the purchase order terms.

payeeRejection.description: Payee declines to participate in the purchase order.

payeeRejectionReason.name: Rejection Reason
payeeRejectionReason.description: Reason why the payee is declining to participate
